testcase.name: test_create_custom_package
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_rbac_features.py:424: in test_create_custom_package assert response.status_code == 200, f"Create package failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create package failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","services"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"salon_id":"a9b1b6e7-482c-4dc0-904a-9fa50cc283d3","customer_phone":"+919999999999","customer_name":"Test Customer","package_name":"TEST_Custom_Package","service_ids":["b9f6c86d-898b-4bcb-8984-cb2fb4110340","77875289-1383-480a-a9b0-98d722c79a9b"],"service_names":["Haircut","Beard Trim"],"total_original":230.0,"discount_percentage":10,"total_discounted":207.0,"notes":"Test custom package"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_customer_membership

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected response: 500 - Internal Server Error assert False
